div.p: Hydra Configuration Enables parameter sweeps, multirun experiments, and configuration composition
GPU Acceleration (v0.9.4+) BatchExecutor / StreamingExecutor C++/CUDA backend provides high-performance FFT processing for all benchmarks
Snakemake Pipeline DAG-based workflow with automatic dependency resolution and parallelization
Modular Analysis Engine Class-based analyzers handle specific benchmark types. AnalysisEngine orchestrates.
Spectrogram Subsystem Generates static PNGs for dashboard display (used by Snakemake rules)
